name: Darell
notes: Met him at an origami club meeting maybe a month ago. We've crossed paths at a couple TASA events since — he seems chill but I don't really know him. Haven't talked one-on-one outside of those.

context.how_we_met: Met at Bruin Origami Club during early fall quarter of freshman year at UCLA.

memories_together: Attended a few TASA events together (TFTI event, fam slime-making event)
